channel.title: Intermezzo: A Fuzzy Story
channel.description: Recent content on Intermezzo: A Fuzzy Story

item.title: Analysis 1: Power, Economy, and Psychoanalysis
item.description: Something through Foucauldian and Lacanian perspectives.

item.title: Lacanian 1: the Big Other’s Absence and Inherent Lack
item.description: Philles symbolizes the inherent incompleteness and constructed nature of the Big Other, highlighting both its apparent absence and intrinsic lack.
